plan_metadata.name: Basic Custom Engine Azure OpenAI js Copilot Remote Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Custom Engine Agent" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents interface.
Click the "Basic Custom Engine Agent" option in the dropdown menu to select an intelligent agent description within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Default folder" option in the Workspace Folder dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
